title: Sharpness Lore
description:
Addon for Serilum's Grindstone Sharper Tools Mod.
The datapack displays the sharpness as item lore.
body:
Extremely tiny and simple datapack for Serilum's Grindstone Sharper Tools Mod. The datapack displays the sharpness as item lore.

**Grindstone Sharper Tools Mod**: [https://modrinth.com/mod/grindstone-sharper-tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/grindstone-sharper-tools)

I highly recommend disabling **showUsesLeftInItemName** in the config file.
```
"showUsesLeftInItemName": false
```


I made this for myself but thought someone else might also like this.
